name: deep-slop
description: Deep AI slop detection with 18 AST-powered engines, 181+ rules, density-aware scoring, SARIF 2.1.0 output, MCP server, and auto-fix pipeline.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && NODE_ENV=production tsdown && npx esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/deep-slop-bundled.js --external:web-tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-typescript --external:tree-sitter-python --external:tree-sitter-go --external:tree-sitter-rust --external:tree-sitter-php --external:tree-sitter-c-sharp --external:tree-sitter-swift --banner:js="import{createRequire}from\"node:module\";const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" && npx esbuild src/mcp.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/mcp.js --external:web-tree-sitter --external:tree-sitter-typescript --external:tree-sitter-python --external:tree-sitter-go --external:tree-sitter-rust --external:tree-sitter-php --external:tree-sitter-c-sharp --external:tree-sitter-swift --banner:js="import{createRequire}from\"node:module\";const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);"

author: Romanchello
